{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Kiro's Remnant
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's Remnant]] is mentioned by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
